listings.name: Codfish Cottage
listings.title: Codfish Cottage Cabin on the Strait of Juan de Fuca
listings.summary: Quaint and Rustic Beachfront Cabin
listings.description:
This rustic cabin features a small living/dining area, kitchen, bathroom and shower. There is no electricity in the cabin but all appliances (oven and refrigerator) and lights are powered via propane. One bed is is the main living area and the other is in a small bedroom, both have incredible waterfront views. Relax on the beach or bring your boat for some of the best fishing and crabbing in the Pacific NW. You will never forget this place! Make it a family tradition!

Whiskey Creek Beach NW has exquisite views of the Straight of Juan De Fuca. The Codfish Cottage cabin is situated only a few feet from the beautiful pebble beach with unobstructed views of the Canadian Cascades.

Located just 25 minutes outside Port Angeles, our guests can enjoy the serenity and beauty of the Olympic Peninsula with easy access to town and some of the best hiking, hunting, fishing and exploring you will ever find. There is so much to do in and around the Olympic National Forest, so take your time and enjoy your stay!

Nearby Olympic National Park entrances like the Sol Duc, Hurricane Ridge, Hoh Rain Forest, Cape Flattery make this location an excellent "base camp" from which you can explore the Olympic Peninsula and towns like Forks, Neah Bay and beaches like Shi Shi Beach and Hobuck Beach. Explore the parks, walk the rivers (Dungeness, Elwha and many more), kayak on Lake Crescent or drop right in the Strait from our private boat ramp. During the Winter and Fall, enjoy the true nature of the Pacific Northwest: observe the high tides, storm surges and occasional dense marine fog from the comfort of your cozy cabin. You are going to love this place!

*** A note to our winter guests: December and January have been known to produce King Tides. During extreme weather conditions your reservation may need to be altered or rescheduled. Do not hesitate to contact us with any questions.

** Strict Pet Policy: Please inform me upon booking that you would like to bring a pet. We allow 1 pet 25lbs and under. Fee ranges by breed. (starting at $10 a night for non-shedding, smaller pets if you bring your own bedding for your bed). To save a large portion of the pet fee, please bring along your own bedding (blankets and pillows) for your beds. Please keep pets off all furniture. Keep pets on a leash when out in the campground. Keep them under control and clean up after them.

listings.name: Captains Quarters
listings.title: Captains Quarters Olympic Beach Cabin on the Strait of Juan De Fuca
listings.summary: Quaint, rustic beachfront cabin
listings.description:
This rustic cabin features a small living/dining area, kitchen, bathroom and shower. *There is no electricity in the cabin.* All appliances are run on propane, refrigerator oven and lights. A cozy propane heated stove will keep you warm on the cool NW evenings. One bed in the living area (queen) and a full and twin bunk are in a small bedroom.

Incredible waterfront views. Relax on the beach or bring your boat for some of the best fishing and crabbing in the Pacific NW. Take a walk on the private beach and see memorizing sunsets, beautiful tide flats, bald eagles, seals, otters and even the occasional passing whale. Near several Olympic National Park entrances, the Hoh Rain Forest, Cape Flattery and much more. You are going to love this place! Make it a family tradition!

Located just 25 minutes outside Port Angeles, our guests can enjoy the serenity and beauty of the Olympic Peninsula with easy access to town and some of the best hiking, hunting, fishing and exploring you will ever find.

Nearby Olympic National Park entrances like the Sol Duc, Hurricane Ridge, Hoh Rain Forest, Cape Flattery make this location an excellent "base camp" from which you can explore the Olympic Peninsula and towns like Forks, Neah Bay and beaches like Shi Shi Beach and Hobuck Beach. Explore the parks, walk the rivers (Dungeness, Elwha and many more), kayak on Lake Crescent or drop right in the Strait from our private boat ramp. During the Winter and Fall, enjoy the true nature of the Pacific Northwest: observe the high tides, storm surges and occasional dense marine fog from the comfort of your cozy cabin. You are going to love this place!

*** A note to our winter guests: December and January have been known to produce King Tides. During extreme weather conditions your reservation may need to be altered or rescheduled. Do not hesitate to contact us with any questions.

** Strict Pet Policy: Please inform me upon booking that you would like to bring a pet. You will need to pay the pet fee in the office upon arrival. Fee ranges by breed. (starting at $10 a night for non-shedding, smaller pets if you bring bedding for your bed). To save a large portion of the pet fee, please bring along your own bedding (blankets and pillows) for your beds. Please keep pets off all furniture. Keep pets on a leash when out in the campground. Keep them under control and clean up after them.

listings.name: Halibut Hole
listings.title: Halibut Hole Olympic Beach Cabin on the Strait of Juan De Fuca
listings.summary: Quaint, rustic beachfront cabin
listings.description:
This rustic cabin features a lower level with small living/dining area, kitchen, bathroom and shower. There is no electricity in the cabin but all appliances (oven and refrigerator) and lights are powered via propane. Amazing views of the Strait right from your bed! 

Stay cozy and warm with 2 heating stoves. One is wood burning stove (bring your own wood to burn). The other option is a thermostat controlled propane fireplace heats the cabin well, no wood required. You can use which ever source of heat you prefer, we do not however, provide firewood for the wood burning stove. Bring your own wood or purchase bundles on site. 

Relax on the beach or bring your boat for some of the best fishing and crabbing in the Pacific NW.

Located just 25 minutes outside Port Angeles, our guests can enjoy the serenity and beauty of the Olympic Peninsula with easy access to town and some of the best hiking, hunting, fishing and exploring you will ever find.

During the Winter and Fall, enjoy the true nature of the Pacific Northwest: observe the high tides, storm surges and occasional dense marine fog from the comfort of your cozy cabin. You are going to love this place!

*** A note to our winter guests: December and January have been known to produce King Tides. During extreme weather conditions your reservation may need to be altered or rescheduled. Do not hesitate to contact us with any questions.

** Strict Pet Policy: Please inform me upon booking that you would like to bring a pet. Pet fee is $35.

listings.summary: Quaint, rustic beachfront cabin
listings.description:
This rustic cabin has a small living/dining area, kitchen, bathroom with shower. There is no electricity in the cabin but all appliances (oven and refrigerator) and lights are powered via propane. There is one queen size bed and one brand new couch that folds out to a full size bed in the main living area. All with incredible waterfront views. Relax on the beach or get cozy next to the flaming propane stove.

listings.name: Barnacle Hill
listings.title: Barnacle Hill Olympic Beach Cabin on the Strait of Juan De Fuca
listings.summary: Quaint and Rustic Beachfront Cabin
listings.description:
This one room rustic cabin that has a small living/dining area, kitchen, bathroom and shower. There is no electricity in the cabin but all appliances (oven and refrigerator) and lights are powered via propane. There are 2 beds. One queen mattress and a full size sleeper sofa. Outside the windows from where you sit to drink your coffee, display a wonderful view of the Strait. Inside, snuggle in and enjoy the beautiful glowing flames and warmth of the propane fire stove. Relax on the beach or bring your boat for some of the best fishing and crabbing in the Pacific NW.

Whiskey Creek Beach NW has exquisite views of the Straight of Juan De Fuca. The Codfish Cottage cabin is situated only a few feet from the beautiful pebble beach with unobstructed views of the Canadian Cascades.

listings.name: Driftwood Cottage
listings.title: The Driftwood Cottage at Whiskey Creek Beach NW
listings.summary: Strait View Cabin at Whiskey Creek Beach NW
listings.description:
Whiskey Creek Beach NW has exquisite views of the Straight of Juan De Fuca as well as easy access to the Olympic National Park. From the Strait View Cabin you can hear the waves crashing all day and night and walk right to the beach, view the Canadian Cascades, Mount Baker and spectacular sunrise/sunsets! Bring your kayak or boat for some of the best fishing and crabbing in the Pacific NW. You will never forget this place! Make it a family tradition!

This quaint Cabin is a real gem! You will love the rustic atmosphere and the view is just breathtaking. Private access, your own outdoor fire pit and picnic table. Features one bedroom with twin bunks and a queen bed in the main living area. Kitchen has cookware, utensils, coffee pot, refrigerator stove and microwave. Take a short walk down to the private beach, or relax on the covered porch and enjoy memorizing sunsets, beautiful tide flats, bald eagles, seals, otters and even the occasional passing whale.

*This is not a pet friendly cabin

Located just 25 minutes outside Port Angeles, our guests can enjoy the serenity and beauty of the Olympic Peninsula with easy access to town and some of the best hiking, hunting, fishing and exploring you will ever find. There is so much to do in and around the Olympic National Forest, so take your time and enjoy your stay!

Nearby Olympic National Park entrances like the Sol Duc, Hurricane Ridge, Hoh Rain Forest, Cape Flattery make this location an excellent "base camp" from which you can explore the Olympic Peninsula and towns like Forks, Neah Bay and beaches like Shi Shi Beach and Hobuck Beach. Explore the parks, walk the rivers (Dungeness, Elwha and many more), kayak on Lake Crescent or drop right in the Strait from our private boat ramp. During the Winter and Fall, enjoy the true nature of the Pacific Northwest: observe the high tides, storm surges and occasional dense marine fog from the comfort of your cozy cabin. You are going to love this place!

Features a bedroom with a full-size bed. An upstairs loft room with a queen size bed. There is couch bed with a queen size memory foam mattress in the living room.. The couch and 2 swivel chairs in the living area and a dining table. The propane stove in the living area makes for a cozy warm setting throughout the whole place. A full kitchen with cookware, utensils, coffee pot, refrigerator stove and microwave.

listings.name: Prevost Tour Bus
listings.title: Prevost Tour Bus at Whiskey Creek Beach NW
listings.summary: Luxury Tour Bus
listings.description:
Whiskey Creek Beach NW has exquisite views of the Straight of Juan De Fuca and is centrally located on the Olympic Peninsula near several National Park entrances, pristine hiking trails, waterfalls and beautiful wildlife. This classic luxury tour bus is a cool place to stay while you enjoy the views on our property and a great base as you head out for adventures on the Peninsula.

The Prevost Private Coach is situated with beautiful waterfront and mountain views and is very easy to access. Full hook-ups mean you have water, electricity, hot showers and a private restroom. You will also have your own fire pit, Adirondack chairs and picnic table. The master bedroom features a queen sized mattress. The kitchen has a fill-sized fridge, cookware, microwave, refrigerator and stove top. The living area has a small dining table, reading chair and a couch with double recliners facing the beautiful views as well as a cozy electric fire place. Come and enjoy your stay in one of the most sought after luxury coach brands ever built.

Located just 25 minutes outside Port Angeles, our guests can enjoy the serenity and beauty of the Olympic Peninsula with easy access to town and some of the best hiking, hunting, fishing and exploring you will ever find. There is so much to do in and around the Olympic National Forest, so take your time and enjoy your stay!

Nearby Olympic National Park entrances like the Sol Duc, Hurricane Ridge, Hoh Rain Forest, Cape Flattery make this location an excellent "base camp" from which you can explore the Olympic Peninsula and towns like Forks, Neah Bay and beaches like Shi Shi Beach and Hobuck Beach. Explore the parks, walk the rivers (Dungeness, Elwha and many more), kayak on Lake Crescent or drop right in the Strait from our private boat ramp. During the Winter and Fall, enjoy the true nature of the Pacific Northwest: observe the high tides, storm surges and occasional dense marine fog from the comfort of your cozy cabin. You are going to love this place!

listings.name: A-Frame T05
listings.title: A-Frame Site 5 Shelter w/ Incredible Ocean View
listings.summary: Primitive tent site with picnic table and fire pit
listings.description:
Whiskey Creek Beach NW has exquisite views of the Straight of Juan De Fuca. This unique camp shelter is situated right above the beautiful pebble beach with incredible views of the Canadian Cascades. *note: Designated parking at the site, please see map for details. This site is ADA accessible, but is not required for booking.  First come first serve. *also note, our Wifi can be spotty due to our remote location.

This super cool A-Frame shelter is an awesome addition to our property.  Bring your own sleeping bag and camping gear, we supply 2 single size mats (4" thick) to sleep on. There is a small table and chair set and a fire-pit BBQ as well as access to fresh water. Only a short walk to the port-a-potty. The large windows offer beautiful views all day (and night) of the water, Canadian Cascades, stars and wildlife.  You will surely never forget this place!

Located just 25 minutes outside Port Angeles, our guests can enjoy the serenity and beauty of the Olympic Peninsula with easy access to town and some of the best hiking, hunting, fishing and exploring you will ever find. listings.name: A-Frame T09
listings.title: Whiskey Creek Beach Front A-Frame Site 9
listings.summary: Beachfront A-Frame Shelter
listings.description:
Whiskey Creek Beach NW has exquisite views of the Straight of Juan De Fuca. This unique A-Frame shelter is situated only a few feet from the beautiful pebble beach with unobstructed views of the Canadian Cascades. *note: You are able to drive up approx. 10 yards from this site to unload, and parking for beach sites(T9-14) are up a hill. No parking at the site. *also note, our Wifi can be spotty due to our remote location.

Bring your own sleeping bag and camping gear, we supply 2 single size mats (4" thick) to sleep on.  There are two Adirondack Chairs, a picnic table and a fire-pit BBQ as well as access to fresh water. Nearby porta-potty, no showers.  This site offers beautiful views all day (and night) of the water, Canadian Cascades, stars and wildlife. You will never forget this place!

Located just 25 minutes outside Port Angeles, our guests can enjoy the serenity and beauty of the Olympic Peninsula with easy access to town and some of the best hiking, hunting, fishing and exploring you will ever find. There is so much to do in and around the Olympic National Forest, so take your time and enjoy your stay!

Nearby Olympic National Park entrances like the Sol Duc, Hurricane Ridge, Hoh Rain Forest, Cape Flattery make this location an excellent "base camp" from which you can explore the Olympic Peninsula and towns like Forks, Neah Bay and beaches like Shi Shi Beach and Hobuck Beach. Explore the parks, walk the rivers (Dungeness, Elwha and many more), kayak on Lake Crescent or drop right in the Strait from our private boat ramp. During the Winter and Fall, enjoy the true nature of the Pacific Northwest: observe the high tides, storm surges and occasional dense marine fog from the comfort of your cozy cabin. You are going to love this place!

listings.name: A-Frame T15
listings.title: A-Frame Shelter (T15)  - Oceanside Views
listings.summary: Bluffside Camping Shelter
listings.description:
Whiskey Creek Beach NW has exquisite views of the Straight of Juan De Fuca. This unique camp shelter is situated right above the beautiful pebble beach with incredible views of the Canadian Cascades. *note: Designated parking at the site, please see map for details. *also note, our Wifi can be spotty due to our remote location.

This super cool A-Frame shelter is perfect for camping and offer unparalleled ocean views. Bring your own sleeping bag and camping gear, we supply 2 single size mats (4" thick) to sleep on. There is a small table and chair set and a fire-pit BBQ as well as access to fresh water. Only a short walk to the port a potty. The large windows offer beautiful views all day (and night) of the water, Canadian Cascades, stars and wildlife.  You will surely never forget this place!

Located just 25 minutes outside Port Angeles, our guests can enjoy the serenity and beauty of the Olympic Peninsula with easy access to town and some of the best hiking, hunting, fishing and exploring you will ever find. listings.name: Tent Site T1
listings.title: Ocean View Tent Site T1
listings.summary: Primitive tent site with picnic table and fire pit
listings.description:
Whiskey Creek Beach NW has exquisite views of the Straight of Juan De Fuca. These tent sites are situated near the beautiful pebble beach with beautiful views of the Canadian Cascades on Vancouver Island. Mount Baker is visible as well. We have many tent sites so if the dates you are looking for are already taken, please give us a call about availability. We also have additional waterfront cabins and full hookup RV spaces.

This primitive tent site includes a picnic table and a fire-pit as well as access to fresh water.

There are port-a-potties available.* Showers are no longer available*

listings.summary: Beachfront Camping Shelter
listings.description:

listings.name: Forested Cottage
listings.title: Forested Cottage in the Woods, near Olympic Park
listings.summary: Quaint and Rustic Cabin
listings.description:
The quaint Little Red Cabin in the Woods is a real gem! You will love the rustic decorations and the view is beautiful. Private access, your own outdoor fire pit and picnic table to enjoy. Features a bedroom with a full-size bed and a queen sized pull-out bed in the living area.  Couch and several chairs in the living area and a dining table. The wood-fire stove in the living area makes for a cozy warm setting throughout the whole place (NOTE: The wood burning fireplace is a secondary heat source for the cabin. (Firewood bundles can be purchased at booking or at the WCBNW office). A full kitchen with cookware, utensils, coffee pot, refrigerator stove and microwave. The bathroom offers a shower/tub and small sink vanity.

*This is not a pet friendly cabin

This cabin is owned by the neighboring Whiskey Creek Beach NW  which has exquisite views of the Straight of Juan De Fuca as well as easy access to the Olympic National Park. You have access (walk or drive) to the beach where you can full views of the Canadian Cascades and relax or bring your boat for some of the best fishing and crabbing in the Pacific NW. You will never forget this place! Make it a family tradition!

Located just 25 minutes outside Port Angeles, our guests can enjoy the serenity and beauty of the Olympic Peninsula with easy access to town and some of the best hiking, hunting, fishing and exploring you will ever find. There is so much to do in and around the Olympic National Forest, so take your time and enjoy your stay!

Nearby Olympic National Park entrances like the Sol Duc, Hurricane Ridge, Hoh Rain Forest, Cape Flattery make this location an excellent "base camp" from which you can explore the Olympic Peninsula and towns like Forks, Neah Bay and beaches like Shi Shi Beach and Hobuck Beach. Explore the parks, walk the rivers (Dungeness, Elwha and many more), kayak on Lake Crescent or drop right in the Strait from our private boat ramp. During the Winter and Fall, enjoy the true nature of the Pacific Northwest: observe the high tides, storm surges and occasional dense marine fog from the comfort of your cozy cabin. You are going to love this place!

listings.name: Cottage Lyre River
listings.title: Hilltop Home in the Woods on Lyre River, near Olympic Park
listings.summary: Hilltop home overlooking the beautiful Lyre River.
listings.description:
The quaint home in the woods is a real gem! You will love the eclectic bohemian styled decor and the view is beautiful. Private access and a beautiful wrap around porch where you can look down on the river and hear the water running. The upstairs Master bedroom features its own stunning views with a large window wrapped rotunda, well furnished sitting area where you can relax and view the river and a luxurious king-sized bed.  The master bath has a jetted spa-tub and standing shower. The second bedroom features a queen sized bed and there is a trundle bed/couch situated in a cozy bay window with beautiful views. The wood-fire stove in the living area makes for a cozy warm setting throughout the whole place (NOTE: The wood burning fireplace is a secondary heat source for the cabin. (Firewood bundles can be purchased on-site). A full kitchen with cookware, utensils, coffee pot, refrigerator stove and microwave. The downstairs bathroom offers a clawfoot tub and small sink vanity.

*This is not a pet friendly home
*The wood fire stove is functional, however, we do not have firewood available. If you would like to use the wood-burning stove, please bring your own wood. We ask that you do not gather outside wood or sticks to burn in the fireplace.

This home has exquisite forest and river views as well as easy access to the Olympic National Park and Lake Crescent (only 15 minute to the North shores.). You have access (walking) to the Lyre River where there is a sitting area so you can let the river serenade you. 

Located just 30 minutes outside Port Angeles, our guests can enjoy the serenity and beauty of the Olympic Peninsula with easy access to town and some of the best hiking, hunting, fishing and exploring you will ever find. listings.name: Cottage Tiny Lyre
listings.title: Tiny Home in the Woods with Lyre River access, near Olympic Park
listings.summary: Tiny home in forested area with Lyre River access.
listings.description:
The quaint tiny home in the woods is a real gem! You will love the eclectic bohemian styled decor and the view is beautiful. Private access and a beautiful front porch.  Queen sized bed in the bedroom, full kitchen and combined dining and living areas.  A cozy place to stay any time of the year and great access to the Olympic National Park and Discovery Trail.  There is also a gazebo a few steps away with a standing grill for guest use.  Bring your own charcoal to use the grill.

*This is not a pet friendly home

This home has exquisite forest views as well as easy access to the Olympic National Park and Lake Crescent (only 15 minute to the North shores.). You have access (walking) to the Lyre River where there is a sitting area so you can let the river serenade you.
